steps.title: Set the timeline
steps.content: The first sentence is in 1987 (past). The second sentence opens with Years later, he ______ — describing what happened after 1987 from the perspective of that earlier past. We need a verb that expresses a future relative to a past reference point.

steps.title: Pick the right tense
steps.content:
A (had been honored) is past perfect — implies it happened before 1987, the opposite of what we need. C (is honored) and D (will be honored) clash with the past frame.

B (would be honored) is the past-future construction — "years later" from a past viewpoint. B is correct.
